title: Endorsement
description: An endorsement of a publication to be sent to Plaudit.

email.description: The email address of the endorser

status.description: Describes the state of the endorsement. Check Endorsement class.

emailToken.description: Token used to validate the endorser's identity

emailCount.description: The number of confirmation emails sent to the endorser

lastEmailDate.description: The date of the last confirmation email sent to the endorser
